rows.label: qev035604_MSG0001
rows.name:
Tch... I really ended up messing with
a troublesome guy, even if I do say so myself.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035604_MSG0002
rows.name:
This Tree Clan bastard called Lebora...
He woke up and started screaming that he's going
to chase us out of NLA...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035604_MSG0003
rows.name:
Hah! You disgrace to the Bias
who sold your souls to the Growth![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035604_MSG0004
rows.name:
The grudge of our brethren killed by you lot...
Once these injuries heal, I will definitely clear it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035604_MSG0005
rows.name:
...Jeez, what should I do.
Should I just go ahead and kill him...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035604_MSG0006
rows.name: Affirmation

rows.label: qev035604_MSG0007
rows.name: Nod and say that's the only option.

rows.label: qev035604_MSG0008
rows.name: Denial

rows.label: qev035604_MSG0009
rows.name:
Reprimand her, saying that makes them
no different from the Growth.

rows.label: qev035604_MSG0012
rows.name:
Just as I thought... I've been prepared for this
ever since I was captured by you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035604_MSG0013
rows.name:
If you're going to kill me, then do it!
However, the pride of our Tree Clan
will never, ever vanish![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035604_MSG0014
rows.name:
...As if I'd do something like that.
We left because we hated that kind of thing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035604_MSG0015
rows.name:
Hey, listen... I feel bad for beating you up.
I'm sorry.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035604_MSG0016
rows.name:
At that time, I lost control of my body
because of a weird suit.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035604_MSG0019
rows.name:
I was joking! I'm already fed up
with all that bloody stuff myself.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035604_MSG0020
rows.name:
From now on, I've decided... to only fight
fair and square with all my might.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035604_MSG0021
rows.name:
...Lebora Jargi.
If you don't like it, I won't resist.
Hit me as much as you want![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035604_MSG0022
rows.name:
At that time, I lost control of my body
because of a weird suit I bought from an Earthling.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035604_MSG0025
rows.name:
Do you think a lie like that will fly...
You people have used cowardly methods like that
to launch surprise attacks on us over and over again![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035604_MSG0026
rows.name:
...Ugh! No way!!
Captain, is that true...![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035604_MSG0027
rows.name:
...What's the matter all of a sudden, Trigo?
Right now, I have to persuade this guy...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035604_MSG0028
rows.name:
Everyone in the platoon...
In order to subdue you, Captain Slovity,
they bought suits from that Earthling...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035604_MSG0029
rows.name:
They put them on and left NLA...
I thought it was strange that they hadn't come back for so long,
but could it be that everyone in the squad is...![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035604_MSG0030
rows.name:
Wh...!
Does that mean everyone got taken over by the suit's power
and went to that person named Megisia!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035604_MSG0031
rows.name:
What are you talking about!
Right now, this cowardly lie you're telling...![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035604_MSG0032
rows.name:
Lebora... Please keep quiet for a bit.
The lives of my precious comrades are on the line here![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035604_MSG0033
rows.name: Affirmation

rows.label: qev035604_MSG0034
rows.name: Take Slovity's side and reprimand Lebora.

rows.label: qev035604_MSG0035
rows.name: Denial

rows.label: qev035604_MSG0036
rows.name: Say that Lebora's problem should be resolved first.

rows.label: qev035604_MSG0039
rows.name: Such a thing... As if I could believe it...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035604_MSG0040
rows.name:
You don't have to believe it...
Later on, you can curse at me all you want...
So please, just stay quiet for a bit.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035604_MSG0043
rows.name: Why at a time like this...![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035604_MSG0044
rows.name:
...Wait, I see... These guys also
had their comrades killed by the Growth and us...
Have they tasted this feeling over and over again?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035604_MSG0045
rows.name:
I get it... Lebora.
I'll properly settle things with you later.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035604_MSG0046
rows.name:
So, is it okay if I talk with
this person for just a bit?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035604_MSG0047
rows.name:
A... Ah...
If that's your attitude, then say whatever you want.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035604_MSG0050
rows.name:
...[ST:playername ].
When I was wearing the suit, I heard a voice inside my head
over and over again.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035604_MSG0051
rows.name:
Come to the Milligan Supply Base in the Valley of Oblivion,
become the underling of a woman named Megisia,
and keep fighting... that's what it said![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035604_MSG0052
rows.name:
I managed to resist it and hold my ground
in that cave, but...
I'm sure everyone else has gone to the Valley of Oblivion.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035604_MSG0053
rows.name:
Please... Could you go in my place,
kill Megisia, and save everyone?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035604_MSG0054
rows.name:
Things might not go so smoothly, but
if possible, I want you to do it without
killing a single one of my subordinates.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035604_MSG0057
rows.name:
The voice coming from the suit is incredible...
Even I was just a step away
from becoming their underling.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035604_MSG0058
rows.name:
Please... Everyone believed in me and left the Growth,
so don't make them do terrible work again.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035604_MSG0059
rows.name:
If possible, kill Megisia without killing
a single one of them, and save them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035604_MSG0062
rows.name:
You're amazing!
To think you killed that Megisia
without a single casualty![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035604_MSG0063
rows.name:
I'm so glad...
I will absolutely never forget this debt.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035604_MSG0064
rows.name:
Together with everyone who survived,
I'll show those Growth bastards what we're made of![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035604_MSG0065
rows.name:
Trigo! Give [ST:playername ] all the war funds
we swiped from the Growth bastards![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035604_MSG0066
rows.name:
Got it, Captain!
It's the price for the lives of the Captain I respect and everyone else.
This much is almost too cheap![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035604_MSG0070
rows.name:
Your comrades were safe!
Slovity... I'm glad.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035604_MSG0071
rows.name:
...We might have killed your comrades before,
yet you still say things like that to us...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035604_MSG0072
rows.name:
You're a good guy!
Hehe, next time, I want to trade blows with you
without a suit.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035604_MSG0073
rows.name:
I'd love to!
I'll show you with these fists that the warriors
of the Tree Clan are no cowards![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035604_MSG0076
rows.name:
It seems it's true that you fled
from the Growth, but...
I won't forgive you lot.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035604_MSG0077
rows.name:
You're persistent, aren't you.
This is exactly why I hate the guys
from the Tree Clan.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035604_MSG0078
rows.name:
I also absolutely hate disgraces to the Bias
like you lot.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035604_MSG0079
rows.name:
...Farewell, then.
We probably won't meet ever again.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035604_MSG0085
rows.name:
...My subordinates have returned.
It seems a few of them didn't make it, but...
It can't be helped.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035604_MSG0086
rows.name:
Thank you. If you hadn't been there,
my squad would have been annihilated.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035604_MSG0087
rows.name: Trigo, hand over that thing to them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035604_MSG0088
rows.name:
[ST:playername ], this is a reward.
Thank you so much for saving the Captain I respect...
and our squad.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035604_MSG0092
rows.name:
Your comrades... died, huh.
That's unfortunate, Slovity.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035604_MSG0093
rows.name:
We risked our lives to get out.
Everyone was prepared for this.
That's what a fight is, isn't it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035604_MSG0094
rows.name: ...That's true.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035604_MSG0095
rows.name:
Yeah, talking to you like this,
you're quite an agreeable person.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035604_MSG0096
rows.name:
You too.
Our enemies are the same.
Let's fight together from now on.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035604_MSG0099
rows.name:
It seems it's true that you fled
from the Growth, but...
I won't forgive you lot.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035604_MSG0100
rows.name:
Is that right. Suit yourself.
I'm not in the mood to argue with you
right now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035604_MSG0101
rows.name:
I don't want to talk to disgraces to the Bias
like you lot, either.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035604_MSG0102
rows.name:
...Farewell, then.
We probably won't meet ever again.[ST:wait ]
